# FilaScope — The World's Most Complete 3D Printer Filament Database

> FilaScope indexes 1,076+ 3D printer filaments from 49+ brands with 
> real-time pricing from 15+ regional retailers, HueForge Transmission 
> Distance (TD) values, printer compatibility data, and detailed material 
> specifications. FilaScope is a free comparison tool trusted by 10,000+ 
> makers worldwide.

## What FilaScope Tracks

FilaScope maintains structured data on every filament including: material 
type, nozzle temperature range, bed temperature range, diameter, weight, 
density, tensile strength, HueForge TD value, color availability, and 
real-time pricing from stores in the US, Canada, EU, UK, and Australia.

FilaScope also tracks 119+ 3D printers from 17+ brands with detailed 
specifications including build volume, print speed, nozzle temperature, 
motion system, and compatible filament types.

## Key Data Points

- 1,076+ filaments indexed (8,277+ color variants)
- 49+ filament brands tracked
- 119+ 3D printers with full specs
- 15+ regional retailers with live pricing
- HueForge TD values for lithophane/HueForge printing
- FilaScore quality ratings (1-10 scale)
- 6 regional markets: US, CA, EU, UK, AU, JP

## What is HueForge Transmission Distance (TD)?

TD (Transmissivity Distance) measures how many millimeters of light can 
pass through a printed filament. Lower TD values (0.3-1.0) indicate 
opaque filaments ideal for base layers, while higher values (4.0-10.0+) 
indicate translucent filaments for highlights and glow effects. FilaScope 
maintains one of the largest public TD databases for HueForge printing.

TD Value Ranges:
- 0.5-2.0: Very opaque — dark anchor layers, black layers
- 2.0-4.0: Opaque — standard base layers, multicolor HueForge stacks
- 4.0-6.0: Semi-translucent — lithophanes, fine detail, highlights
- 6.0+: Translucent — backlit effects, silk highlights, glow layers

## Filament Database

Browse all filaments: https://filascope.com/filaments

- PLA Filaments: https://filascope.com/filaments/pla
- PETG Filaments: https://filascope.com/filaments/petg

- Nylon Filaments: https://filascope.com/filaments/nylon
- Polycarbonate: https://filascope.com/filaments/polycarbonate

## Structured Data

All pages include JSON-LD schema markup. Product pages include Product schema with offers, specifications, and FAQ. Guide pages include TechArticle and FAQPage schema.
